title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXI. Riddles.
content:
See, see! what shall I see?
        A horse's head where his tail should be.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXI. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
